hip_opt_snippets_rag.scope: HIP kernel optimization clues + tricks with code snippets (LLM/RAG friendly)

snippets.title: Coalesced global memory access (baseline)
snippets.clue: Map threadIdx.x to consecutive addresses; avoid strided/scattered access.
rewrite_moves: Linearize indexing (flatten multi-dim indices)
Reorder loops so contiguous dimension is mapped to x-thread dimension

snippets.title: Grid-stride loop
snippets.clue: Handle arbitrary sizes; keep launch config stable; each thread processes multiple elements.
rewrite_moves: Replace one-element-per-thread kernels with grid-stride loops
Tune gridDim to cover enough work and hide latency

snippets.title: Vectorized loads/stores (float4)
snippets.clue: If aligned, use wider vector types to reduce instruction count and improve throughput.
watch_for: high instruction count per byte moved
rewrite_moves: Add an aligned fast-path + scalar tail for remainder
Consider half2/bfloat162 when using fp16/bf16

snippets.title: LDS/shared-memory tiling skeleton (GEMM-like)
snippets.clue: Load tiles into shared memory (LDS), sync, compute, repeat; reduces global traffic.
rewrite_moves: Tune TILE to balance reuse vs register/LDS pressure
Apply register blocking (each thread computes multiple outputs)
Consider prefetching next tile before __syncthreads (software pipelining)

snippets.title: Wave/warp shuffle reduction (intra-wave)
snippets.clue: Use shuffles to reduce within a wavefront efficiently; reduce shared-memory use.
rewrite_moves: Do a two-stage reduction: wave shuffle -> one value per wave -> final reduce
Minimize __syncthreads usage

snippets.title: Predication to reduce divergence
snippets.clue: Replace small divergent branches with conditional expressions when safe.
rewrite_moves: Hoist uniform conditions outside the kernel
Group data so branches are coherent across lanes where possible

snippets.title: Strength-reduce / and % in index math
snippets.clue: Replace divide/mod by shift/mask when power-of-two; hoist invariants out of loops.
rewrite_moves: Use bit tricks only when mathematically valid (power-of-two divisors)
Move repeated calculations into registers outside loops

snippets.title: Reduce register pressure (shorter live ranges)
snippets.clue: Shorten live ranges of temporaries; avoid excessive unrolling; split kernels if needed.
rewrite_moves: Reduce unroll factors if registers explode
Avoid large per-thread arrays; use shared memory for shared data

snippets.title: Overlap H2D/D2H transfers with compute using streams
snippets.clue: Use hipMemcpyAsync + streams; overlap copies with kernels to hide transfer latency.
rewrite_moves: Pipeline batches (double-buffering)
Avoid hipDeviceSynchronize in hot paths; prefer stream sync when needed

snippets.title: Autotune block size (quick knob sweep)
snippets.clue: Best block size depends on register use, memory pattern, and occupancy—measure it.
rewrite_moves: Add additional knobs: unroll factor, TILE size, vector width
Cache best configs per shape (M,N,K or n)

if_signals: achieved bandwidth is high but compute utilization low
then_try: reduce bytes moved (fuse kernels, avoid redundant loads)
use fast reduction primitives for normalization/softmax substeps
split kernel or move shared data to LDS
